summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the new Proveedores module in Configuración and Proveedor dropdown in Vulnerabilidades form. All features working correctly - CRUD operations, dropdown integration, and year filter functionality verified.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - charts may have rendering issues on initial load

passed_tests: GET /api/config/proveedores - Returns list of 4 providers (F2TC, GBM, Pentraze, SISAP)
GET /api/config/proveedores - Structure validation (id, nombre, activo, created_at)
POST /api/config/proveedores - Creates new provider successfully
POST /api/config/proveedores - Rejects duplicate provider names with 400
PUT /api/config/proveedores/{id} - Updates provider name
PUT /api/config/proveedores/{id} - Toggle activo status excludes from dropdown
DELETE /api/config/proveedores/{id} - Deletes provider successfully
DELETE /api/config/proveedores/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent ID
PUT /api/config/proveedores/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent ID
GET /api/dropdown-options - Includes proveedores field with catalog providers
GET /api/dropdown-options - All required fields present
GET /api/vulnerabilidades?proveedor=F2TC - Filters by provider correctly
GET /api/vulnerabilidades?año=2024 - Filters by year correctly
POST /api/vulnerabilidades - Saves proveedor from dropdown
PUT /api/vulnerabilidades/{id} - Updates proveedor field
UI: Login with admin/admin123 credentials
UI: Proveedores tab visible in Configuración
UI: Proveedores section shows 4 expected providers
UI: Create new proveedor via modal form
UI: Delete proveedor with confirmation
UI: Year filter dropdown in Vulnerabilidades (2023, 2024, 2025, 2026)
UI: Year filter changes results count (225 → 147 for 2024)
UI: Proveedor field is a Select dropdown (not text input)
UI: Proveedor dropdown shows all catalog providers
UI: Can select provider from dropdown (F2TC selected)
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about chart dimensions in Dashboard - recharts library warning about width/height being -1
seed_data_creation: Test provider 'TestProveedorUI' was created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Proveedores module fully implemented. 4 existing providers: F2TC, GBM, Pentraze, SISAP. The proveedor field in vulnerabilities form is now a Select dropdown instead of text input. Year filter works correctly in Vulnerabilidades list page.
